business_question: What is the sales contribution of newly launched products compared to existing products?
business_context: Product leadership wants to evaluate the effectiveness of recent product launches.
sql_answer:
SELECT
    PRODUCT_STATUS,
    SUM(NET_UNITS_SOLD) AS SALES
FROM FACT_SALES s
JOIN DIM_PRODUCT p
    ON s.PRODUCT_KEY = p.PRODUCT_KEY
GROUP BY PRODUCT_STATUS;
